subcodes.first_line: O Lord! From the Lote-Tree of Thy Oneness Thou hast caused branches and offshoots to spring forth, extending unto the heights of Thy mercy, beneath its sheltering shade [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رب قد انبت من سدره فردانیتک افنانا و فروعا ممتده فی اوج رحمانیتک مظلله
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @firmness in the Covenant
